$comment: Source snapshot for the 9M LREP legacy-contributor merkle manifest. Each claimant's `legacyWeight` is the sum of (a) their migrated old-claim amount (which already includes any claimant-side curyo referral bonus they received as a referee) and (b) the referrer rewards they EARNED on curyo by referring others. The 9M LREP pool is distributed pro-rata by legacyWeight, floor to 6-decimal LREP units, with the remaining atomic units assigned by largest fractional remainder (ties broken by original-manifest index order). This methodology was first applied to the previous 4M LREP RateLoop distribution snapshot (commit b9183134, packages/foundry/migrations/legacy-lrep-claims.json) — re-using the same legacyWeights here keeps the 9M distribution proportional to the same on-chain history. See packages/foundry/migrations/README.md (commit b9183134) for the curyo log-source description.
weightRule: legacyWeight = old migrated claimant amount (already inclusive of claimant-side curyo referral bonus) + curyo referrer rewards earned by the account.
roundingRule: Pro-rata by legacyWeight; floor each share to 6-decimal LREP units; allocate the remaining atomic units to the entries with the largest fractional remainder, ties broken by original-manifest index order.
